series: Silicon Data LLM Token Expenditure Index
unit: Usage-weighted average price (USD) per 1M LLM tokens, market-wide
methodology: Expenditure/usage-weighted average token price across major LLMs — captures the market's marginal willingness to pay. Rising = migration toward expensive frontier closed models; falling = migration toward cheap open-weight models. Published by Silicon Data (silicondata.com); carried on Bloomberg/Macrobond; no free structured feed.
update_workflow: Run /update-silicon-data in a Claude session — Claude reads @Silicon_Data public posts and press coverage, then appends dated points here. Never overwrite existing points; estimates must set estimated=true with derivation in source.

points.source: Derived: 1.99 / 1.94 from 'rose 94% over six months' ending 2026-06-05 (Silicon Data via Digg, 2026-06-05)
Carmen Li (Silicon Data CEO) LinkedIn, ~2026-05: 'LLM Token Expenditure Index surges 38% YTD: 1.27 -> 1.76'
End value of '+38% over five months YTD' (same LinkedIn post); value reported, date approximated to post date ~2026-05-10
Silicon Data via Digg, 2026-06-05: 'Token Expenditure Index stagnates at 1.99'

milestones.note: All-time high reported (@TokenTalk3x on X); exact value not published
